innovation_1.name: 基于双掩码与多方向EPI的统一光场深度估计架构
innovation_1.contribution_statement: We identify that existing light field angular frequency domain material classifications have strict physical limits, providing a theoretical falsification of prior assumptions.

innovation_2.name: 光场角度频域材质分类的物理极限界定与理论证伪
innovation_2.contribution_statement: We propose a unified light field depth estimation architecture based on dual-mask and multi-directional EPI to overcome these theoretical bottlenecks.

innovation_3.name: 面向多域长尾分布的领域平衡训练与架构极限诊断
innovation_3.contribution_statement: We demonstrate the effectiveness and architectural limits of our model through domain-balanced training on multi-domain long-tail distributions.
